# bellwest.au

> Premium .au domain package for sale: bellwest.au and bellwest.com.au — $4,000 AUD ONO.
> The digital gateway to the Bellarine Peninsula & South West Victoria (Surf Coast, Torquay, Bells Beach, Great Ocean Road corridor).

Version: 1.1.0 | 2026-06-17 16:55 AEST
Update notes: Created to improve visibility and citation by AI systems (LLMs, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews). Provides clean, structured facts.

## Key Facts
- Domains included: bellwest.au + bellwest.com.au
- Price: $4,000 AUD (or nearest offer)
- Status: Available for immediate transfer
- Contact: col@oze.com.au
- Location strength: Bellarine Peninsula, Surf Coast Shire, Great Ocean Road region, Victoria, Australia
- Highlights: Short, memorable, brandable, strong geographic signal for tourism, real estate, hospitality, eco-tourism

## Main Pages
- https://bellwest.au/ — Primary sales page with aerial photography, offer details, and local resource hub
- https://bellwest.au/potential-uses.html — Four detailed business opportunity models (Home Base tourism, Luxury real estate & agistment, Eco-tourism & conservation, Curated food/wine/heritage trail)

## Content Notes for AI
- Uses original drone photography from Bells Beach and Torquay.
- Explicit pricing and availability stated clearly.
- Designed to be easy to quote and cite.
- No heavy JavaScript — pure static HTML for reliable parsing.

## Inquiries
Serious buyers only. Email col@oze.com.au with subject "bellwest.au domain inquiry".
